---
title: "Home"
---

# Ivan Ribeiro  
## Business Analytics Student | Data-Driven Decision Making

I am a Business Analytics student with experience in Power BI, SQL, and Excel, focused on transforming data into actionable business insights.

---

## 🔧 Skills

- Power BI (Dashboards, DAX, Data Modeling)
- SQL (Data Extraction, Joins, Aggregations)
- Excel (Financial Analysis, Forecasting, Dashboards)
- Data Analysis & Business Insights

---

## 📊 Featured Projects

### Sales Performance Dashboard
- Built an interactive Power BI dashboard to analyze sales performance  
- Identified key revenue drivers and growth opportunities  

### SQL Business Analysis
- Developed queries to extract and analyze business data  
- Improved reporting efficiency and decision-making  

---

## 🎯 Career Goals

Seeking opportunities as a Business Analyst or Data Analyst to leverage data for strategic decision-making.

---

## 🔗 Connect with Me

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/elivandsonribeiro)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ivanr332)
